summary.title: Rubin-Ultra 144 GPU DeepSeek-V4-Pro C++ simulated EAGLE MTP Stage Pareto
summary.description: 144 GPU decode; MTP stage=0..9; accept rate=0.7; x-axis is TPS/user and y-axis is total throughput across all GPUs.
summary.pareto_rule: for each fixed gpu_num, maximize TPS per user and total throughput across the strategy candidate set
summary.mtp_note: MTP rows are generated by the native C++ cost model with MTP_on and mtp_stage enabled. Stage 0 is the matching baseline decode row.
summary.pp_note: PP is swept when --pp-values includes values beyond 1. PD rows cap prefill at 20% of the fixed total, rounded down to an 8-GPU multiple, with decode taking the remainder. Decode A/F split rows pin the F side to groq-lpx3.
